ucs.title: [LLM] APT37 (ScarCruft) RokRAT C2 to legitimate cloud-storage APIs from non-browser process
ucs.description: Hunts for non-browser/non-sync-client processes (especially LOLBins or processes running from user-writable paths) communicating with pCloud, Dropbox, Yandex Disk, and Google Drive APIs — the canonical RokRAT/Chinotto C2 channel that APT37 has used since 2018 (Talos 'Group123', Volexity InkySquid, Microsoft DEV-0530/Diamond Sleet adjacent reporting).
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(All_Traffic.dest) as dest values(All_Traffic.dest_port) as dest_port values(All_Traffic.app) as app from datamodel=Network_Traffic.All_Traffic where (All_Traffic.dest_host IN ("api.pcloud.com","eapi.pcloud.com","content.dropboxapi.com","api.dropboxapi.com","cloud-api.yandex.net","cloud-api.yandex.com","www.googleapis.com","oauth2.googleapis.com")) by host All_Traffic.user All_Traffic.process_name All_Traffic.process_path All_Traffic.dest_host
| `drop_dm_object_name(All_Traffic)`
| where NOT match(process_name,"(?i)^(chrome|msedge|firefox|brave|iexplore|opera|outlook|onedrive|dropbox|yandexdisk|googledrivefs|googledrivesync|backupandsync)\.exe$")
   OR match(process_path,"(?i)\\(AppData|Temp|Public|ProgramData|Users\\Public)\\")
| `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)`
ucs.kql:
let _CloudC2 = dynamic(["api.pcloud.com","eapi.pcloud.com","content.dropboxapi.com","api.dropboxapi.com","cloud-api.yandex.net","cloud-api.yandex.com","www.googleapis.com","oauth2.googleapis.com"]);
let _LegitClients = dynamic(["chrome.exe","msedge.exe","firefox.exe","brave.exe","iexplore.exe","opera.exe","outlook.exe","onedrive.exe","dropbox.exe","yandexdisk.exe","googledrivefs.exe","googledrivesync.exe","backupandsync.exe","teams.exe"]);
let _LolBins = dynamic(["powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","mshta.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","certutil.exe","bitsadmin.exe","curl.exe"]);
DeviceNetworkEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where RemoteUrl has_any (_CloudC2)
| where InitiatingProcessFileName !in~ (_LegitClients)
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ (_LolBins)
   or InitiatingProcessFolderPath has_any (@"\AppData\Local\Temp\", @"\AppData\Roaming\", @"\Public\", @"\ProgramData\", @"\Users\Public\")
| where InitiatingProcessAccountName !endswith "$"
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessFolderPath, InitiatingProcessCommandLine, InitiatingProcessSHA256, RemoteUrl, RemoteIP, RemotePort
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let _CloudC2 = dynamic(["api.pcloud.com","eapi.pcloud.com","content.dropboxapi.com","api.dropboxapi.com","cloud-api.yandex.net","cloud-api.yandex.com","www.googleapis.com","oauth2.googleapis.com"]);
let _LegitClients = dynamic(["chrome.exe","msedge.exe","firefox.exe","brave.exe","iexplore.exe","opera.exe","outlook.exe","onedrive.exe","dropbox.exe","yandexdisk.exe","googledrivefs.exe","googledrivesync.exe","backupandsync.exe","teams.exe"]);
let _LolBins = dynamic(["powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","mshta.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","certutil.exe","bitsadmin.exe","curl.exe"]);
ImNetworkSession
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where DstHostname has_any (_CloudC2) or Url has_any (_CloudC2)
| extend ProcName = tolower(tostring(split(ActingProcessName, @"\")[-1]))
| where ProcName !in (_LegitClients)
| where ProcName in (_LolBins) or ActingProcessName has_any (@"\AppData\", @"\Temp\", @"\Public\", @"\ProgramData\")
| where ActorUsername !endswith "$"
| project TimeGenerated, DvcHostname, ActorUsername, ActingProcessName, ActingProcessCommandLine, DstHostname, DstIpAddr, DstPortNumber, Url
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.rationale: ScarCruft/RokRAT has used pCloud, Yandex Cloud, Dropbox and Google Drive REST APIs as its primary C2 since at least 2018 — documented across Cisco Talos (Group123), Volexity (InkySquid BLUELIGHT), ESET (Dolphin), and Microsoft (ZINC/Diamond Sleet adjacent reporting). The C2 hostnames are the same handful regardless of campaign because RokRAT's HTTP transport is hard-coded per build. Legitimate use

_field_issues.message: `AccountName` is not a column of DeviceNetworkEvents; it does exist on DeviceProcessEvents, DeviceLogonEvents, DeviceEvents, IdentityLogonEvents, IdentityQueryEvents, IdentityDirectoryEvents, IdentityInfo, AlertEvidence, SecurityEvent, CommonSecurityLog, ASCDeviceEvents.

_sentinel_field_issues.message: `ActingProcessName` is not a column of ImNetworkSession; it does exist on ImProcessCreate, ImFileEvent, ImRegistryEvent.
`ActorUsername` is not a column of ImNetworkSession; it does exist on ImProcessCreate, ImAuthentication, ImFileEvent, ImRegistryEvent.
`ActingProcessCommandLine` is not a column of ImNetworkSession; it does exist on ImProcessCreate, ImFileEvent, ImRegistryEvent.

ucs.title: [LLM] APT37 (ScarCruft) oversized-LNK chain: explorer-spawned shell carving payload from .lnk
ucs.description: Detects APT37's signature spear-phishing chain where a ZIP-delivered, oversized (>1MB) Windows shortcut, when double-clicked from explorer.exe, spawns cmd.exe / powershell.exe that reads embedded shellcode/decoy bytes from the LNK itself (via findstr, ReadAllBytes, Get-Content, or seek-by-offset) before launching RokRAT and a decoy HWP/DOCX/PDF — observed in Genians/AhnLab and ASEC reporting on the 2022-2024 ROKRAT/M2RAT/RustyAttr campaigns targeting South Korean government, defectors and journalists.
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as command values(Processes.process_path) as image values(Processes.parent_process) as parent_command from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.parent_process_name=explorer.exe AND (Processes.process_name=powershell.exe OR Processes.process_name=pwsh.exe OR Processes.process_name=cmd.exe OR Processes.process_name=mshta.exe) AND (Processes.process="*.lnk*" OR Processes.process="*ReadAllBytes*" OR Processes.process="*Get-Content*" OR Processes.process="*findstr*" OR Processes.process="*::OpenRead*") by host Processes.user Processes.process_name Processes.parent_process_name Processes.process
| `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)`
| where match(command,"(?i)\.lnk") AND match(command,"(?i)(ReadAllBytes|Get-Content|findstr|::OpenRead|Seek|FromBase64String|TVqQAA|substring|\.hwp|\.docx|\.pdf)")
| `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)`
ucs.kql:
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(14d)
| where InitiatingProcessFileName =~ "explorer.exe"
| where FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","mshta.exe")
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| extend Cmd = tolower(ProcessCommandLine)
| where Cmd has ".lnk"
| where Cmd has_any (
    "readallbytes","get-content","findstr","::openread","seek",
    "frombase64string","tvqqaa","substring","position",
    ".hwp",".docx",".pdf",".xlsx")
   or Cmd matches regex @"(?i)\$\w+\s*=.*\.lnk.*(seek|position|read|content)"
   or Cmd matches regex @"(?i)findstr\s+/[a-z]\s+[\w]+\s+.*\.lnk"
| join kind=leftouter (
    DeviceFileEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(14d)
    | where ActionType == "FileCreated"
    | where FileName endswith ".lnk" and FileSize > 1000000
    | project DeviceId, LnkFile = FileName, LnkSize = FileSize, LnkTime = Timestamp
  ) on DeviceId
| where isnotempty(LnkFile) or Cmd has ".lnk"
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine, FileName, ProcessCommandLine, LnkFile, LnkSize, LnkTime
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let _LnkDrops = ImFileEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(14d)
    | where EventType == "FileCreated"
    | where TargetFileName endswith ".lnk"
    | where TargetFileSize > 1000000
    | project DvcHostname, LnkFile = TargetFileName, LnkSize = TargetFileSize, LnkTime = TimeGenerated;
ImProcessCreate
| where TimeGenerated > ago(14d)
| where ParentProcessName =~ "explorer.exe"
| extend ChildName = tolower(tostring(split(TargetProcessName, @"\")[-1]))
| where ChildName in ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","mshta.exe")
| where ActorUsername !endswith "$"
| extend Cmd = tolower(TargetProcessCommandLine)
| where Cmd has ".lnk"
| where Cmd has_any ("readallbytes","get-content","findstr","::openread","seek","frombase64string","tvqqaa","substring","position",".hwp",".docx",".pdf")
   or Cmd matches regex @"(?i)findstr\s+/[a-z]\s+\w+\s+.*\.lnk"
| join kind=leftouter _LnkDrops on DvcHostname
| project TimeGenerated, DvcHostname, ActorUsername, ParentProcessCommandLine, TargetProcessName, TargetProcessCommandLine, LnkFile, LnkSize, LnkTime
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: APT37 ScarCruft Oversized-LNK Embedded Payload Extraction
id: 7a3e2c14-9e5f-4d7c-9a83-apt37scarcruftlnk
status: experimental
description: Detects explorer-spawned cmd/powershell that reads bytes from a .lnk file, indicative of APT37 (ScarCruft / RokRAT / M2RAT) oversized-LNK delivery chain
references:
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0067/
  - https://asec.ahnlab.com/en/?s=scarcruft
  - https://blog.talosintelligence.com/rokrat-analysis/
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/06
tags:
  - attack.initial_access
  - attack.execution
  - attack.t1204.002
  - attack.t1059.001
  - attack.t1059.003
  - attack.g0067
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_parent:
    ParentImage|endswith: '\explorer.exe'
  selection_child:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\powershell.exe'
      - '\pwsh.exe'
      - '\cmd.exe'
      - '\mshta.exe'
  selection_lnk:
    CommandLine|contains: '.lnk'
  selection_carve:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'ReadAllBytes'
      - 'Get-Content'
      - 'findstr'
      - '::OpenRead'
      - 'Seek'
      - 'FromBase64String'
      - 'TVqQAA'
      - 'substring'
      - '.hwp'
      - '.docx'
      - '.pdf'
  filter_user:
    User|endswith: '$'
  condition: selection_parent and selection_child and selection_lnk and selection_carve and not filter_user
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate enterprise scripts that parse shortcut files (rare)
  - Some installers reading their own LNK via PowerShell during repair
level: high
ucs.rationale: APT37's ZIP→oversized-LNK→PowerShell-self-carve chain is one of the most distinctive intrusion patterns in the DPRK cluster. ScarCruft has used it consistently against South Korean targets since 2022 (RokRAT, M2RAT, Chinotto, FadeStealer campaigns documented by AhnLab ASEC, Genians, S2W, Check Point) and again in 2024-2025 RustyAttr/'Toast' activity. The chain is specific because (a) the LNK is th
_sigma_issues: sigma parse error: Sigma rule identifier must be an UUID
